subject: Boxue/zhizhi: Build grounded PaperGraph evidence substrate
description:
Boxue delegation plan: boxue_1783769421796684800
Project: What is the future for energy storage? — The Limits of Battery Performance and the Interplay of Chemistry, Materials Science, and Scalability (sci_1783769392951978500)
Domain: Energy Storage / Lithium-ion Batteries / Post-Lithium Systems / Materials Science / Electrochemistry / Grid-Scale Storage / Raw Material Supply Chain / Battery Recycling / Techno-Economic Analysis
Project objective: 围绕一个可证伪的科学问题：'电极材料（如钴酸锂、磷酸铁锂、硫正极）的固有化学稳定性、电解液分解电位、锂/钠离子迁移动力学以及固态电解质界面（SEI）的演化，是否共同决定了一个明确的能量密度上限（例如 < 500 Wh/kg）和循环寿命阈值（例如 < 10,000次，在80%容量保持率下），从而在技术和经济可行性上构成固态/液态电池的固有极限；该上限是否可以通过全新的化学体系（如锂-硫、锂-空气、钠离子）或梯度浓度/纳米结构工程被实质性突破？'
Round goal: 围绕一个可证伪的科学问题：'电极材料（如钴酸锂、磷酸铁锂、硫正极）的固有化学稳定性、电解液分解电位、锂/钠离子迁移动力学以及固态电解质界面（SEI）的演化，是否共同决定了一个明确的能量密度上限（例如 < 500 Wh/kg）和循环寿命阈值（例如 < 10,000次，在80%容量保持率下），从而在技术和经济可行性上构成固态/液态电池的固有极限；该上限是否可以通过全新的化学体系（如锂-硫、锂-空气、钠离子）或梯度浓度/纳米结构工程被实质性突破？'
Assigned agent: zhizhi
Phase: Gap Discovery
Priority: high
Allowed/expected tools: search_papers_stratified, search_papers, extract_structured_info, build_knowledge_map, verify_uniqueness

Task:
Retrieve and structure representative literature without inventing sources.

Deliverable:
Compact JSON evidence report plus search/import recommendations.

Acceptance criteria:
- At least one verifiable source or an explicit retrieval-failure report
- Method/scenario/benchmark/contribution/limitation fields are populated or flagged unknown
- Unsupported claims are marked for human review

Known risks to handle:
- retrieval failure
- low-quality venues
- unsupported method labels

Role boundary: complete only this specialist responsibility. Do not take over Boxue coordination, do not invent evidence, and mark unsupported claims for review.
Output should be compact structured JSON suitable for downstream agents.
